body:
Title: CRA Form T936 2025 Calculation of Cumulative Net Investment Loss to December 31, 2025.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/t936/t936-25e.pdf

CRA T936 2025 calculates cumulative net investment loss (CNIL). Chart A line 3 subtracts Form T2048 line 17215 from Schedule 3 line 19900. Line 7 adds Schedule 3 lines 10700, 11000, and 12400. Line 9 adds line 7 and Form T2017 line 13. Line 10 is the 50% inclusion rate, encoded as 0.50. Line 11 multiplies line 9 by line 10 and floors negative amounts at zero. Line 13 subtracts Form T2048 line 17216 from line 11. Line 14 subtracts line 13 from line 3 and floors negative amounts at zero. Line 17 subtracts T3 box 30 from T3 box 21. Line 18 is the 50% inclusion rate, encoded as 0.50. Line 19 multiplies line 17 by line 18. Line 20 subtracts line 19 from line 14 and floors negative amounts at zero as additional investment income.

Part 1 line 7 is zero if Chart A was not completed; otherwise it is the lesser of Chart A line 20 and line 25300 of the return. Part 1 line A adds lines 1 through 7. Part 2 line 13 is zero if Chart A was not completed; otherwise it is Chart A line 20. Part 2 line B adds lines 8 through 13. Part 3 line 16 adds current-year line 14 and previous-years line 15. Line 18 subtracts Form T2048 line 17218 from line 16. Line 21 adds current-year line 19 and previous-years line 20. Line C subtracts line 21 from line 18 and floors negative amounts at zero. If claiming a capital gains deduction, line C is reported on line 16 of Step 2 of Form T657.
